title: Dysmenorrhea follow-up

presenting_history.text: Defines the Dubai telehealth setting and menstrual, pain, associated symptom, functional impact, contraception, medical, surgical, and sexual history required for dysmenorrhoea assessment.
presenting_history.rationale: Directly supports entered history in source scope.
presenting_history.evidence_extract: Defines the Dubai telehealth setting and menstrual, pain, associated symptom, functional impact, contraception, medical, surgical, and sexual history required for dysmenorrhoea assessment.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Dysmenorrhoea – 26

exact_section.heading: 2. Scope; 3. Purpose; 4. Applicability; 5.1 Virtual Clinical Assessment and Clinical History

red_flags.text: Lists sudden or constant severe pain, peritonism, fever, abnormal bleeding or discharge, instability, anaemia, weight loss, infertility, dyspareunia, non-midline pain, and progressive symptoms as concern features.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Lists sudden or constant severe pain, peritonism, fever, abnormal bleeding or discharge, instability, anaemia, weight loss, infertility, dyspareunia, non-midline pain, and progressive symptoms as concern features.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Dysmenorrhoea – 26

exact_section.heading: 6. Red Flags and exclusion of secondary dysmenorrhoea

red_flags.text: Defines emergency and specialist referral contexts for sudden or severe pain, peritonism, pregnancy concern, abnormal bleeding, fever or discharge, progressive symptoms, and suspected secondary pathology.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Defines emergency and specialist referral contexts for sudden or severe pain, peritonism, pregnancy concern, abnormal bleeding, fever or discharge, progressive symptoms, and suspected secondary pathology.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Dysmenorrhoea – 26

medication.text: Describes lifestyle measures and follow-up after teleconsultation; medication doses were reviewed but are not mapped into the workflow.
medication.rationale: Supports actual response and follow-up discussion.
medication.evidence_extract: Describes lifestyle measures and follow-up after teleconsultation; medication doses were reviewed but are not mapped into the workflow.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Prior diagnosis, pregnancy possibility, cycle, pain, bleeding, response, medicines and examination are absent.
No primary or secondary classification, treatment, dose or referral is generated.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
